title: More Density Functions
description: Utility mod to add more density functions for world generation datapacks.
body:
# More Density Functions
Like the title says, this is a utility mod that adds more density functions types for datapack developers. With these additions, you will be able to do things that were previously impossible with the vanilla density function types.

## Check the [Wiki](https://github.com/Klinbee/MoreDensityFunctions/wiki) to view all functions added and their usage

## Future Additions
1. Functions 
   - Simplex Noise
   - Proper Cache2D implementation that doesn't invalidate itself
   - Proper Cache Once
   - Multi-functions (e.g. a `moredfs:add` where the input arguments are a list of density functions)
